title: ctenium somalense
intro: Ctenium somalense is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as the 'Somali Needle Grass'. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Ctenium somalense is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its health benefits.
